scene_summary.scene_description: G3 Jingtai Expressway in Beijing, camera facing south at K3+303. Dual carriageway with 3 lanes each direction separated by green anti-glare panels. A white vehicle is stopped on the left emergency lane with trunk open. Sparse traffic with cars and one truck visible. Sound barriers on right side. Timestamp shows 14:38 on April 1, 2026.

instances.description: White sedan stationary on left shoulder of expressway with trunk open for entire video duration (6 seconds). Vehicle does not appear to be in a designated emergency parking area.
instances.reasoning: The vehicle is stopped on the expressway shoulder (not a designated emergency lane) for an extended period with trunk open. On Chinese expressways, stopping on shoulders is prohibited except in emergencies, and even then requires proper safety measures. The prolonged stationary state without visible emergency indicators suggests illegal parking rather than a brief emergency stop. However, confidence is moderate because: (1) the vehicle is on shoulder not main lane, (2) trunk open could indicate mechanical breakdown, (3) short observation window, and (4) no explicit no-stopping signage visible.

event_results.summary: One potential illegal parking instance detected: white sedan stopped on left expressway shoulder for approximately 6 seconds with trunk open. Vehicle appears to be parked in a non-designated emergency stopping area on the G3 Jingtai Expressway.
No Emergency Lane Occupancy Detection (0 instance(s))

No Traffic Accident detected in the video. A white vehicle is stationary on the left emergency shoulder with its trunk open for approximately 6 seconds, which appears to be a routine stop or minor breakdown rather than a traffic accident. No collision damage, smoke, fire, debris, or overturned vehicles are visible. All other traffic is moving normally in their respective lanes.

No Person Presence in Highway detected in the video. While there is a white vehicle stopped on the shoulder with its trunk open (potentially indicating a stranded motorist situation), no actual human figure is visible outside the vehicle on the highway lanes, shoulder, or median in any of the provided frames.
No Motorcycle Presence detected in the video.

No Heavy Congestion detected in the video. The highway shows very light traffic with only 2-4 vehicles visible across multiple lanes at any given time. Vehicles are widely spaced with no queuing, no stop-and-go patterns, and no high-density clustering. A white vehicle stopped on the shoulder with its trunk open appears to be a disabled vehicle, not a congestion event. Lane occupancy is extremely low with most lanes completely empty throughout the 6-second observation period.
No Road Construction detected in the video.

instances.description: White sedan with trunk open on left emergency lane moving backward
instances.reasoning: In first frame, white sedan with trunk open is positioned lower on the emergency lane (around y=220). In last frame, same vehicle has moved upward on screen to approximately y=140. Since Road 0 normal flow is 'down' (toward bottom of frame), moving upward on screen is opposite to normal flow direction. Vehicle maintains same orientation (facing camera/downward) but position shifted against flow, indicating reversing behavior on emergency shoulder.
